message:
feat: add featured sites section and improve landing page copy

Add a new "More from the flywheel" section showcasing JeffreysPrompts.com
and Agent-Flywheel.com with polished OG-style link preview cards.

New Featured Sites Section:
- FeaturedSite interface in lib/content.ts with id, title, tagline,
  url, ogImage, gradient, and icon fields
- Two featured sites:
  * JeffreysPrompts.com: Battle-tested prompts for AI coding agents,
    installable as Claude Code skills
  * Agent-Flywheel.com: Interactive setup wizard for the complete
    flywheel ecosystem

New FeaturedSites Component (components/featured-sites.tsx):
- OG link preview card design inspired by Twitter/Discord embeds
- 1.91:1 aspect ratio image area (standard OG ratio)
- Gradient backgrounds with central icon and subtle glow effects
- Domain display with link icon
- Hover effects: scale, glow, border highlight
- Framer Motion animations with reduced motion support
- Responsive grid layout (1 col mobile, 2 col sm+)

Landing Page Updates (app/page.tsx):
- New section between Flywheel Preview and Projects
- Updated flywheel tool count: 7 → 13 in snapshot section
- Changed flywheel preview link: /projects → /tldr
- Updated CTA text: "Explore the interactive flywheel" → "Explore the TLDR"
- Newsletter em dash fix: "No spam—just signal" → "No spam, just signal"

Content Copy Improvements (lib/content.ts):
- Ultimate MCP Server: Replaced em dashes with parentheses for tool list
- All tldr tool descriptions cleaned up (committed in previous commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
